Title: Wajib Eloquent ORM - dilarang raw query
Evidence: Semua akses DB harus via Eloquent. DB::raw()/DB::select() dilarang kecuali aggregasi kompleks. Ref: ASVS V5, CWE-89

Title: Mass assignment protection via $guarded
Evidence: Semua model HARUS $guarded=["id"]. Tidak $fillable. Ref: CWE-915

Title: Blade escaping - dilarang {!! !!} tanpa sanitasi
Evidence: Output Blade HARUS {{ }}. {!! !!} hanya untuk HTML dari Citadel renderSchema(). Ref: CWE-79

Title: Middleware auth pada protected routes
Evidence: Route admin: cek_login+internal_placement. Route API: basic_auth/jwt.verify. Ref: ASVS V4, CWE-862

Title: Inline validation wajib di controller
Evidence: Setiap store()/update() HARUS $request->validate([...]). Project tidak pakai Form Request class

Title: Citadel Page lifecycle pattern wajib
Evidence: Controller HARUS ikuti: ComponentsPage::make()->view()->business()->schema()->render()

Title: HasCreator trait wajib pada model bisnis
Evidence: Model entitas bisnis HARUS trait HasCreator untuk tracking created_by/updated_by. Ref: SOX Compliance

Title: ActivityLogged trait wajib pada model bisnis
Evidence: Model entitas bisnis HARUS trait ActivityLogged (Spatie) untuk pencatatan perubahan

Title: Enum status dengan label() dan color()
Evidence: Field status HARUS PHP 8.1 Enum dengan label():string dan color():string. Implement CitadelEnum

Title: Custom table name dengan prefix escm_
Evidence: Semua model HARUS $table property eksplisit dengan prefix escm_. Tidak boleh auto naming

Title: Permission check via checkAccessPermission()
Evidence: Setiap controller method bisnis HARUS checkAccessPermission($permission) di awal. Format: feature:action. Ref: ASVS V4

Title: Aksi non-CRUD sebagai method tersendiri
Evidence: Operasi bisnis (propose/release/sync/approve/esign) HARUS method tersendiri bukan generic update

Title: Schema component harus implement Backbone
Evidence: Komponen dalam schema([...]) HARUS implement Backbone interface. Pelanggaran = error BACKBONE[001]

Title: Makeable pattern untuk factory instantiation
Evidence: Citadel component HARUS via ::make($name $title). Dilarang new ComponentClass() langsung

Title: HasNumbering trait untuk auto-numbering
Evidence: Model procurement (Tender/PO/PR/Contract) HARUS trait HasNumbering + interface UseNumbering

Title: Tidak ada Observer class - semua di boot method
Evidence: Project TIDAK pakai Observer class. Event handling via boot()/bootTraitName() di trait

Title: Tidak ada Form Request class - validasi inline
Evidence: TIDAK pakai Form Request class. Semua validasi inline $request->validate() di controller

Title: $guarded bukan $fillable
Evidence: Standar: $guarded=["id"] bukan $fillable. Semua field selain id bisa mass-assign

Title: Response pattern: apiRes() helper untuk JSON
Evidence: Response JSON HARUS apiRes('success'/'error' ...). Form sukses: Citadel Swal::make('success')

Title: Sync mechanism mandatory untuk data eksternal
Evidence: Data dari SAP/HCMS/VMS/Pengadaan.com HARUS punya sync service dedicated di app/Sync/Service/

Title: Sync service harus extend Base
Evidence: Sync service HARUS extend App\Sync\Service\Base. Implement: fetching() handleResponseForCache() saving()

Title: Scope-based data access multi-tenant
Evidence: Akses data procurement HARUS ESCM::scopeProject(auth()->user()). Ref: CWE-639 IDOR

Title: Password/PIN masking di semua log
Evidence: Middleware logging HARUS masking: password password_confirm pass pin. Ref: CWE-532

Title: SoftDeletes hanya untuk entitas tertentu
Evidence: SoftDeletes HANYA pada User/Vendor/VendorQuotation. Mayoritas model pakai status flag

Title: Relationship key menggunakan business key
Evidence: Beberapa relationship pakai business key (nomor dokumen) bukan surrogate key. Konsistensi SAP

Title: Approval workflow via morphMany pattern
Evidence: Model approval HARUS implement ApprovableContract + trait ReleaseStrategyModel. Polymorphic morphMany

Title: Procurement module interface wajib
Evidence: Entitas procurement HARUS implement ProcurementModule dengan getProcurementNumber() historyModelName()

Title: Explicit route definition bukan Route::resource()
Evidence: TIDAK pakai Route::resource(). Semua route eksplisit per method untuk kontrol granular

Title: Multi-layer authentication
Evidence: 3 layer: Session(cek_login) + BasicAuth+IP(basic_auth) + JWT(jwt.verify). Ref: Defense in Depth

Title: CSRF protection tanpa exception
Evidence: CSRF aktif untuk semua POST/PUT/DELETE. VerifyCsrfToken $except HARUS kosong. Ref: CWE-352
